title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I started working with Mejiro Dober
just the other day, but three years is swiftly
coming to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's left quite the indelible mark on the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this is far from the end of her journey, and in
order to shine even brighter, she'll be pushing
herself just as hard today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Whew. That should be good enough for a
warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Dober! You're the best racer ever!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
The levels of preciousness she and Bright share
when they run together... I've been blessed this
morning...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list:
You don't get nervous anymore, even when
you're being watched.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess you're right. I couldn't stand having
any eyes on me when we first met.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It feels like so long ago...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I must say, I don't think that's the biggest
change in you, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well, compared to three years ago...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You're far, far, faaar more honest with your
trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? No, I'm not! What are you even talking
about?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: B-Bright! Don't say it like that! It's embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Never mind! I've never thought anything about
him, got it?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Goodness, how terrifying! ♪ I'd best run for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can never get in a word against her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Why I'm so different than I was three years ago.
